steps.title: Identify the structural signal
steps.content: The passage claims that “a younger generation of musicians has embraced the stylistic experimentation of Keyboard Fantasies.” The underlined sentence immediately follows to develop this point.

steps.title: Determine the sentence's function
steps.content:
The underlined sentence provides specific examples — Kelela and Jamila Woods, plus “other contemporary recording artists” — of younger musicians influenced by the album, directly supporting the preceding claim.

An incorrect response mistakes the sentence as urging musicians to adopt the sound, an incorrect response references criticism never mentioned in the passage, and an incorrect response invents a contrast where the relationship is one of influence.

That confirms C is correct.
